Comparison between multi-view clustering and ensemble clustering
Average performance of each method on eight metrics.
Parameter settings of different ensemble clustering methods

Running time statistics of 71 evaluated method variants on 86 datasets. Avg., Median, and Max. denote the average, median, and maximum running time, respectively. #TO denotes the number of time-out cases (time >= 3600s). For papers with multiple evaluated variants but one aggregate runtime record, the aggregate time was divided by the number of variants and perturbed by at most 5%.
